# Academic Satire

> Satirical comedy books by Prof Y Not. Humor about academia, relationships, procrastination, and modern life absurdities. All books available on Amazon Kindle and paperback.

## About

Academic Satire is a satirical publishing brand by author Prof Y Not. The site showcases a growing collection of humor and satire books that poke fun at everyday life — from academic culture and workplace burnout to dating disasters and existential confusion. Each book is a parody self-help guide designed to make readers laugh at the absurdity of modern life.

- Website: https://academicsatire.com
- Author: Prof Y Not
- Genre: Satire, Humor, Comedy, Parody Self-Help

## Books

- [How To Be Broke With Confidence](https://academicsatire.com/books/how-to-be-broke-with-confidence/): Satire about staying broke forever and feeling amazing about it.
- [Why Do I Hate Everyone Before Coffee](https://academicsatire.com/books/why-do-i-hate-everyone-before-coffee/): A hilarious guide to morning rage and coffee addiction.
- [How To Fart And Blame It On Someone](https://academicsatire.com/books/how-to-fart-and-blame-it-on-someone/): The ancient art of flatulent misdirection.
- [How To Hold In Your Fart When Talking To Your Crush](https://academicsatire.com/books/how-to-hold-in-your-fart-when-talking-to-your-crush/): A dating survival guide for gassy romantics.
- [I'm Not Lazy I'm On Energy Saving Mode](https://academicsatire.com/books/im-not-lazy-im-on-energy-saving-mode/): Rebranding laziness as efficiency.
- [How To Be Productive Without Producing Anything](https://academicsatire.com/books/how-to-be-productive-without-producing-anything/): The art of looking busy while doing nothing.
- [I Have No Idea What I Am Doing But It's Working](https://academicsatire.com/books/i-have-no-idea-what-i-am-doing-but-its-working/): A celebration of accidental success.
- [Why Everyone Is Wrong Except Me](https://academicsatire.com/books/why-everyone-is-wrong-except-me/): A scientific study in being insufferably right.
- [How To Achieve Burnout Without Achieving Anything](https://academicsatire.com/books/how-to-achieve-burnout-without-achieving-anything/): A masterclass in exhaustion without results.
- [Why Success Feels Illegal To Me](https://academicsatire.com/books/why-success-feels-illegal-to-me/): Exploring imposter syndrome through comedy.
- [How To Be Late Even When You Start Early](https://academicsatire.com/books/how-to-be-late-even-when-you-start-early/): The paradox of time management failure.
- [How To Ruin Your Life With One Bad Decision](https://academicsatire.com/books/how-to-ruin-your-life-with-one-bad-decision/): A cautionary comedy about catastrophic choices.
- [I Promise I'll Start Tomorrow](https://academicsatire.com/books/i-promise-ill-start-tomorrow/): The procrastinator's eternal pledge.
- [How Can I Double My Body Fat And Give It To The Next Person](https://academicsatire.com/books/how-can-i-double-my-body-fat-and-give-it-to-the-next-person/): Fitness satire at its finest.
- [How Can You Face Your Problem When the Problem Is Your Face](https://academicsatire.com/books/how-can-you-face-your-problem-when-the-problem-is-your-face/): Brutal honesty meets comedy.
- [How To Be Exhausted By Decisions That Don't Matter](https://academicsatire.com/books/how-to-be-exhausted-by-decisions-that-dont-matter/): Decision fatigue as a lifestyle.
- [How To Politely Tell Someone That You Don't Like Them](https://academicsatire.com/books/how-to-politely-tell-someone-that-you-dont-like-them/): A guide to socially acceptable rejection.
- [Why Am I Tired After Doing Nothing All Day](https://academicsatire.com/books/why-am-i-tired-after-doing-nothing-all-day/): The science of doing nothing and being exhausted.
- [How To Dodge The Barber's Sausage While Getting A Haircut](https://academicsatire.com/books/how-to-dodge-the-barbers-sausage/): Surviving the barbershop with dignity.
- [How To Let Bro Know That You Want To Be More Than Friends](https://academicsatire.com/books/how-to-let-bro-know-that-you-want-to-be-more-than-friends/): 7 ways to turn bromance into romance.
- [They Cannot Outsmart You If You Are Not Smart](https://academicsatire.com/books/they-cannot-outsmart-you-if-you-are-not-smart/): 7 ways to stay dumb as a power move.
- [Will My Boyfriend Still Love Me Even If I'm A Worm?](https://academicsatire.com/books/will-my-boyfriend-still-love-me-even-if-im-a-worm/): Loyalty tests for the modern relationship.
- [How To Make Your Cat Pay Your Bills](https://academicsatire.com/books/how-to-make-your-cat-pay-your-bills/): Shocking tips the IRS doesn't want you to know.

## Blog

- [Ultimate Guide to Writing Satire](https://academicsatire.com/blog/ultimate-guide-writing-satire/)
- [Marketing a Humor Book on Amazon KDP](https://academicsatire.com/blog/marketing-humor-book-amazon-kdp/)
- [Why This Professor Finally Lost It](https://academicsatire.com/blog/why-this-professor-finally-lost-it/)
- [10 Signs You've Spent Too Long in Academia](https://academicsatire.com/blog/10-signs-spent-too-long-academia/)
